purpose: Defines the controlled local Panchang calculation engine input/output schema. This scaffold does not publish public Panchang claims.
guardrails: Do not display Panchang output publicly until method is reviewed.
Do not display tithi, nakshatra, yoga, karana, sunrise, moonrise, or planetary position from placeholder logic.
Every output must preserve location, timezone, method version, and review status.
Homepage integration is blocked until approved calculation method is available.
